basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Patna Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 60 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna) Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Patna. A total of 60 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Patna Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PWBD: 10 years, Ex-Servicemen: 5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree i.e. MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or equivalent in the respective Department recognized by NMC/NBE
qualification.details: Anaesthesiology, Anatomy, Biochemistry, CTVS, CFM, Dermatology, Emergency Medicine, Forensic Medicine & Toxicology, General Medicine, General Surgery, Hospital Administration, Neonatology, Nuclear Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynaecology, Ophthalmology, Orthopaedics, Paediatrics, Pathology/Lab Medicine, Pharmacology, Physical Medicine And Rehabilitation, Psychiatry, Radio-diagnosis, Radiation Oncology, Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank: Post Graduate Degree i.e. MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or equivalent in the respective Department recognized by NMC/NBE. Clinical Haematology: Post Graduate Degree i.e. MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or equivalent in the respective Department recognized by NMC/NBE. For Clinical Haematology, MD in General Medicine or MD in Paediatrics also considered.

salary_details.details: Rs. 67,700/- per month + NPA and allowances.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts at AIIMS Patna?
faq.answer: AIIMS Patna is recruiting for a total of 60 vacancies for the post of Senior Resident (Non-Academic) on an ad-hoc basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report directly at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on 01 June 2026, 02 June 2026, and 03 June 2026, depending on the department.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is a Post Graduate Degree i.e. MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or equivalent in the respective Department recognized by NMC/NBE.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Senior Resident posts is 45 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67,700/- per month, along with NPA and other allowances.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there are application fees. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 1500/-, and SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 1200/-. PwBD and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna, Bihar, 801507.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is an ad-hoc recruitment for Senior Resident (Non-Academic) positions.
